sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 20

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 20:1
items.html:
(to the question) Brit [covenant]
The place of the Zivug [coupling] of the Upper Light — which is at the place of the Masach [screen] and the Aviut [thickness] that raises Ohr Chozer [Returning Light] — is called Brit [covenant]. It is the discernment of Yesod: by force of the ascent of NHY to CHaGaT that took place in the Ibur [conception] of every Partzuf, Malchut received the form of the Yesod and became like its measure. From then on the place of the Zivug rose to the Yesod (see Answer 9), and on this account the Yesod acquired the name Brit. And since there are four discernments of Aviut in the Masach, the measure of the Guf [body] is discerned as four Britot [covenants], for then it acquires its full measure. This is the secret of the verse "and the number of the fourth part of Israel," for the Yesod received into itself the discernment of the Masach and the Aviut that had previously been corrected in the vessel of Malchut — that is, in the Partzufim of AK, as is known. Therefore it is what brings out all the levels of the souls, which are their "fourths" [Reviot] and the seminal drop of ZA, who is called Israel. And so it is even in the Nukva of ZA: the place of the Zivug changed in her too, to the discernment of the Yesod in her, and not in the place of Malchut, which is the discernment of her Ateret HaYesod [crown of Yesod]. (p. 769, Item 52)
